text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I spot a lively trio while I'm out<n>shopping.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Lotsa, lotsa pins! ♪ Cool, cute, and<n>shiny to boot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I hope there are a ton of cute ones to<n>pick from! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So this article wants us to make our<n>school bags
unique with<n>accessories? Being stylish sounds
like a ton of work.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You can't be a real grown-up without<n>keeping up
with the latest trends. ♪<n>Probably.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And decking out your bag with pins is<n>what's in
now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If you wanna be in style, you needto know how to style! Wow, thismagazine sure knows its stuff!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Jumping on the bandwagon is cool<n>and all, but you
gotta make sure<n>you're decorating your own way.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totes! You can't forget<n>originality! Yippee,
I'm so excited<n>now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You can do this, you two! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaddya mean? We're all gettingstylish today, Bono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're already out shopping anyway,<n>so why not
get some matching pins?<n>That would be so
adorbs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oooh! That sounds like so much fun!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's hunt down some cute pins<n>for the
three of us!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And we've gotta make sure they're<n>super unique
too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And then, and then! Let's decorate<n>our bags like
crazy so they're the<n>coolest ones around!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Let's get this started, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the day, it's important to<n>style things
your way. That goes for<n>both fashion and racing.
